steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
Multiply then add.
$$g(8)=80+8=88$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice D is correct. The value of $g\left(x\right)$ when $x=8$ can be found by substituting $8$ for $x$ in the given equation $g\left(x\right)=10x+8$. This yields $g\left(8\right)=10\left(8\right)+8$, or $g\left(8\right)=88$. Therefore, when $x=8$, the value of $g\left(x\right)$ is $88$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $x$ when $g\left(x\right)=8$, rather than the value of $g\left(x\right)$ when $x=8$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
